current_behavior: Grouped persistence walkthroughs. Use `ho-azure persistence` or `ho-azure persistence help` to list surfaces, then `ho-azure persistence <surface>` to run an implemented surface.

surfaces.summary: Review App Service for deployment path, configuration power, code replacement, and reachable re-entry posture.
surfaces.operator_question: How far can current access take me in App Service before I hit the permission boundary between app control, deployment/config control, and later HTTP-backed reuse?

surfaces.summary: Review Azure Automation for reusable code, execution context, and trigger paths.
surfaces.operator_question: How far can current access take me in Azure Automation before I hit a permission boundary?

surfaces.summary: Review Azure ML for reusable compute, job, schedule, endpoint, and identity paths.
surfaces.operator_question: How far can current access take me in Azure ML before I hit a permission boundary?

surfaces.summary: Review Container Apps Jobs for stored job definitions, trigger mode, container image, execution settings, and identity-backed rerun paths.
surfaces.operator_question: How far can current access take me in Container Apps Jobs before I hit the permission boundary between job definition control, trigger mode, image/command, and execution context?

surfaces.summary: Review Function Apps for reusable code, identity, and trigger paths.
surfaces.operator_question: How far can current access take me in Azure Functions before I hit a permission boundary?

surfaces.summary: Review Logic Apps for reusable workflow and trigger paths.
surfaces.operator_question: How far can current access take me in Azure Logic Apps before I hit a permission boundary?

surfaces.summary: Review VM Extensions for Azure-side extension attachment, script or command source, settings posture, VM agent delivery, and rerun paths.
surfaces.operator_question: How far can current access take me through VM Extensions before the proof boundary moves from Azure control-plane configuration into guest-side runtime evidence?

surfaces.summary: Review App Service WebJobs for reusable background code, mode, inherited app context, and rerun paths.
surfaces.operator_question: How far can current access take me in App Service WebJobs before I hit the permission boundary between parent app control, WebJob content, rerun mode, and inherited execution context?
